feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How To create collection group in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.
entry.content:
Dear Support,

We are getting errors in the App Manage Collection Groups "View/table is switched to display mode only". We are not able to create collection group. How to create the collection group.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Invoice Cleared in Manage Customer Line item but not in process flow.
entry.content:
Hi,

When clearing a customer invoice there was a small amount left that should have been cleared (0.1 USD). The invoice was then displayed as cleared even if the full amount not was cleared. When looking into the processflow the journal entry did not have the status cleared. This then creates confusion for the AR clerk that want to make sure that the cleared items are fully cleared in the system.

Why is the document showing as cleared, even if it is not cleared and is there any settings to prevent this?

All the best,

Adam

entry.title: How to extend Ledger 0E?
entry.content:
We are trying to define extension ledger ‘0E’ for commitments, but there is no option.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Batch filling Project timesheet for team
entry.content:
Hi sap,

I want to know it there an app can let user fill timesheet for all team members in one project or wbs? We have a role responsible for fill time resource for team member.

If exists this app, which role or Business Catalogs can let him has permission?

entry.title: How can I use the CICX billing type
entry.content:
How I can create a Pro Forma invoice for a 3rd Party process using CIX5 billing type?

 

I have successfully registered a billing type “CIX1” voucher using SOAP.
But CICX has little information, I need API information and Body.

entry.title: BADI to determine Sales Order header data using sales order item in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have a requirement where I need to determine some of the Sales Order header standard fields based on line items added by user. As of now we have checked multiple BADI's ( SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD, SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD_TAX etc. ) but none of the BADI has both header and Item data and provide Sales Order Header as changing parameter. 

We want to use both Create Sales Order and Manage Sales Order apps as per business requirement.

System : SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 2402

Thanks & Regards,

Aman Mittal

@Julio_B  @shaofeng_qing

entry.title: Creating Down Payment request without reference to any specific PO Items
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

Question:

While creating a down payment request with reference to the Purchase order we are not able to proceed without providing the PO item level details even though it is not a mandatory field to fill in the app "Manage Supplier Down Payment Requests".

Our customer wanted to create a Down Payment Request at PO level but not mandatorily at item level.

Please find the attached image for reference.

Please guide us if there is any feasibility to do so in the same app- "Manage Supplier Down Payment Requests".

Thank you.

Amar Modanwal

entry.title: Maintaining Multiple GR/IR GL Account
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

QUESTION:

We wanted to assign Multiple GR/IR GL Account for different Material Categories but In the Current situation all the adjustment with respect to GR/IR is done through only one "GL Account- 21120000."sap finance

However, if we go to "Automatic Account Determination" Configs we are not able to do so, and the Valuation class option is also greyed out in the system

Please find the attached images for reference and guide us if there is any feasibility to do so in the system.

Thank You

Amar Modanwal

entry.title: Public Cloud Profitability Report
entry.content:
Hi Cloud Experts,

I want to report my profitability. I wanna see a report like a KE24. We have "Market Segments - Actual" and "P&L". But these reports give me all my accounts. We need only profit and costs report with characteristics

 

Thank you

entry.title: What is the name of the CDS that contains "Inventory Price" data in Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have search literally everywhere for "Inventory Price" of a material, in other words, the actual price we calculate with CKMLCP at the end of a period. However, could not find it. I have used both https://api.sap.com/ with "Customer Data Browser" app and also "Eclipse" program but no luck so far.

Does anyone know if there is a CDS for that data? We need it for some development.

These are the data we are searching for:

Best Regards.

entry.title: #COE #BA01 Customer Project Billing Item Detail change logs
entry.content:
Hello,

How can we access the change logs related to billing item details within a Customer Project?

Specifically Billing Partner changes, or changes to Billing Due Dates or amounts. We need to be able to audit/analyze who made a change.

These do not appear to be covered in the Customer Project logs accessed thru Display Change Documents.

Best,

Ryan

entry.title: how to customize user status for technical objects in sap public cloud ?
entry.content:
Hello,

when i connect to SAP public cloud and open technical objects i can see the field userstatus, i want to know how can i customize it and add values to it cause in the customization board i can't see any task related to it.

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to connect RF device to sap public cloud CipherLab RK95 Industrial Mobile Computer.
entry.content: I would like to understand how to connect RF device (CipherLab RK95 Industrial Mobile Computer, certified by Google's Android Enterprise Recommended (AER)) connecting to SAP public cloud to use for warehouse functionalities.

entry.title: How to connect RF device to sap public cloud CipherLab RK95 Industrial Mobile Computer.
entry.content: Is there any document on RF device connection to public cloud, i would like to connect Cipherlab RK95 android device for WM activities.

entry.title: Backup Status of Public Edition ERP
entry.content:
Hi guys,

My client is about the choose Public Edition ERP and plan to IPO this year. According to the auditor from big 4, client needs to get the notification (eg email) if cloud backup failed, or they can find the data backup status in a dashboard. 

Does any management mechanism to know the backup status?

Thanks

Yvonne
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition #Backups

entry.title: Public Cloud: EDI Configuration for Update/Cancel Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hi All 

We have set up a Communication arrangement between SAP Public Cloud and SAP 4/Hana on Premise.  we are using SAP_COM_0224

What we have managed to do is Create and send the Purchase Order to the system via EDI. The Output Parameter Determination is set up for Purchase Order. 

Now what is still missing is the ability to "update and Cancel" the Purchase Order and have the Message be send out via EDI again. Only the Initial Message for the Creation of the Purchase Order is send out. 

My Question is: What do i need to configure that everytime someone changes the PO (Adds an Item or deletes it) a new EDI message with the change is created?

entry.title: Employee´s cost center
entry.content:
Hello!

We have a customer request to register an employee for more than one cost center. Is it possible to make this configuration within  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition   ? In S/4 hana private it is possible to use the infotype 0027.

Thank you!

entry.title: Automatically attach the printed document to the sales invoice in S/4 Hana public cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

We are looking for a way to automatically attach the original printed pdf file that has been sent to the customer to the sales invoice document in S/4 HANA Public Cloud.

This is something we can manage in the on-premise edition using the Archive Link feature. But we didn't find the way to do it in the Public Cloud Edition. 

This is strong requirement of our customer and probably a legal requirement for France. 

Could someone tell us if and how it ?

entry.title: Why is the where used feature no working properly in ADT Eclipse in SAP S/4 HANA public cloud?
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I am working on a SAP S4/HANA Public Cloud system version 2402.

I encountered an error when releasing a Transport Request and decided to debugg in Eclipse. I found that report CTO_REQUEST_RELEASE was called and submitted in background in method "submit_job_report" of if_xco_bg_mgd_host:

Once done, I wanted to do use the where used list upon report "CTO_REQUEST_RELEASE" to find the above mentioned calling method and class, but the where used did not return any result, eventhough I selected all the object types: 

 

I tried with a message from a message class, and same the where used did not work properly!

Am I missing something in the where used properties to make it work?

Thank you

entry.title: Export for transport type CBC locked. No target system available
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I am working on a SAP S4/HANA Public Cloud system version 2402.

I encountered an error when releasing a CBC Transport Request: "Export for transport type CBC locked. No target system available". (Error message: ATO_CMN_EXPORT 036). By the way, I am on a development system and not a starter system. 

Anyone knows why the error is raised? Is it because it might be that the quality system has not been yet provisioned? (the basis guy is on holidays moreover, so, I am afraid we will be stuck for one entire week...)

Is this an action that should be done in CBC? or in Calm?

I tried to debugg in Eclipse ADT the error message when releasing the transport request. I found that report CTO_REQUEST_RELEASE was called and submitted in background for this purpose in the backend. I tried to find a way to debug the background process of the report, but did not succeed. Also in the SAP Community, some recent posts from 04.2024 mentioned that it is not possible in public cloud. Is that really the case? No possibility to debug the report submitted in background in ADT as we used to do before or on premise with SM50 etc?

Thank you
